chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The pausing upon Al Safa and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/70)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/70)
text: مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَكْثُرَ مَالُهُ فَلْيُطِلِ الْوُقُوفَ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Hamdan Bin Suleyman, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Al Waleed, raising it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who intends to boost his wealth, so let him prolong the pausing upon Al-Safa and Al-Marwa’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Hamdan ibn Sulayman from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn al-Walid in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that one who wants his wealth increase should stay on al- Safa’ and al-Marwah for a long time.”
